header.subtitle: A real-time, competitive word-guessing game with multiplayer features. Inspired by

playAlone.title: Play Alone
playAlone.description: Classic Wordle experience. Play unlimited random words at your own pace.

joinRoom.title: Join Room
joinRoom.description: Play with friends in real time. Compete to see who can guess the secret word first.

hostRoom.title: Host Room
hostRoom.description: Create a room and invite friends. Start a multiplayer match and see who solves it first.
